LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN ITS TITLE THROUGH THE TRUSTEE'S SALE BY THE TRUSTEE NAMED IN THE DEED OF TRUST. THE RELOCATION AGREEMENT SPECIFICALLY PROVIDES THAT EVICTION PROCEEDING WOULD CONTINUE ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF WILL NOT PROCEED WITH FORCIBLE REMOVAL IF DEFENDANT'S COMPLY. DEFENDANT'S HAVE NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189
